column1: # BAT (NTRU-based KEM, Fouque–Kirchner–Pornin–Yu, TCHES 2022) via github.com/pornin/BAT.
# The two real security levels are benchmarked; the BAT-128-256 toy set (80-bit,
# 10-byte shared secret) is omitted. Sizes are the encoded (transmitted) byte
# lengths: encode/decode is included in each measured operation.
# Columns: file, name, pk, sk, ct, ss, iters, q, n, logn (sk = long private-key encoding)
